title: citrus × latifolia
intro: Citrus × latifolia, also known as the Meyer lemon, is a citrus plant that is a cross between a lemon (Citrus limon) and an orange (Citrus reticulata). It has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high levels of vitamin C and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Citrus × latifolia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Citrus × latifolia can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, juices, and infusions, as well as being used in cooking and as a garnish for various dishes.
